_comment: Owner Action Queue — the single most important list. Only what needs the OWNER right now. Ordered by priority (high first). priority: high | medium | low. kind: confirm | configure | review | merge | test | decide | provide. Use honest 'if still open / if still active' wording for conditional items. Mission Control tracks these; it does not execute them.

items.title: GrowVerse backend / login recovery (Launch #1) — bring growverse-api up
items.where: Your authenticated machine → Fly (growverse-api) + Vercel (GrowVerse project). Not runnable from Mission Control.
items.action: growverse.dev login still 404s because no healthy backend is wired. From your terminal: set the correct DATABASE_URL → deploy growverse-api → confirm /health = 200 → verify POST /api/game/players → only then set Vercel BACKEND_URL to that healthy backend → redeploy Vercel → test login on growverse.dev. The correct backend is the growpod Python API, NOT frontiernext.
items.blocks: GV-001 and everything downstream — login on growverse.dev

items.title: Verify /lab now 404s on the Vercel mirror (PR #30 merged)
items.action: PR #30 merged 2026-06-20 (vercel.json). Once Vercel rebuilds from main, confirm devbiz.vercel.app/lab/ → 404 while devbiz.vercel.app/ still loads. Can't be checked from Mission Control — owner eyeball on the live Vercel URL.
items.blocks: Confirming /lab is private on the Vercel mirror

items.title: Verify / configure Cloudflare Access for /lab/*
items.where: Cloudflare Zero Trust → Access → Applications (not configured in this repo)
items.action: Open /lab/mission-control/ in a private window. EXPECTED: a Cloudflare Access sign-in appears first. If the dashboard loads with NO prompt, Access is not configured — add /lab and /lab/* to an Access app with Allow = your email(s). There is no app-level login or basic-auth in the repo; the gate lives only in Cloudflare. See docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md.
items.blocks: CP-004 — safe sharing of any deployed /lab link

items.title: Confirm the correct frontier-al folder/repo before Aether Wing Phase 1 (Launch #2)
items.action: Tell the next agent exactly where Aether Wing should be built. No FRONTIER / Aether Wing gameplay starts until this is confirmed.

items.title: Browser-check the Focus Board on main (now merged)
items.action: The Focus Board is merged to main. On your phone, confirm it renders the three project cards (GrowVerse / FRONTIER / Devbiz) with status chips, blocker, owner action, expandable next-actions + backlog, the doc-link pills, and the devbiz-memory brain note.
items.blocks: Nothing — confidence check on the merged Focus Board

items.title: Decide on PR #6 (AI concierge) — the last older Devbiz draft
items.action: PR #20 (Code Lens) and #14 (ledger reconcile) merged 2026-06-20. PR #6 remains a draft awaiting a decision (merge keyless UI, hold, or close). Its backend/AI-key path still needs explicit OWNER-OK. Doesn't block the launch sequence.
